description_long: This is a beige, four-door all-terrain pickup truck with a robust, boxy design and a dark gray roof. The vehicle features a spacious open cargo bed at the rear, suitable for transporting goods or equipment, and a double-cab configuration for carrying multiple passengers. The front end is equipped with a wide grille, rectangular headlights, and a sturdy bumper, while the rear includes a tailgate and visible towing hardware. The wheels are large and fitted with rugged, all-terrain tires, indicating off-road capability. Side steps are present below the doors for easier entry and exit, and the body panels are reinforced for durability. The windows are tinted, and the overall construction suggests a steel frame with glass and rubber components.
description: A beige, four-door all-terrain pickup truck with a dark gray roof, open cargo bed, and rugged tires, designed for both passenger and cargo transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, rectangular headlights, and robust bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the double-cab, side steps, and open cargo bed.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the open cargo bed, tailgate, and towing hardware.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the double-cab, side steps, and cargo bed.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a rugged, all-terrain tread pattern with deep grooves and blocky lugs, suitable for both on-road and off-road conditions.

license_info.creator_display_name: Museum of Engineering and Technology, Krakow
